context: Tests whether Focus Engine guidance corrects SwiftUI form focus state, ambiguous bindings, default focus, and scene command value patterns without drifting into accessibility focus.

checklist.name: Single optional enum focus state
checklist.description: Recommends one optional Hashable enum @FocusState for multiple focus targets rather than separate competing Bool focus states.

checklist.name: Ambiguous binding correction
checklist.description: Explains that reusing the same focus enum value across multiple fields is ambiguous and should be avoided.

checklist.name: Default focus discipline
checklist.description: Recommends one clear default focus target or scoped default focus rather than several competing defaultFocus modifiers.

checklist.name: Focused scene values
checklist.description: Uses focusedSceneValue or focused values for scene, menu, or toolbar actions that depend on the currently focused content.

checklist.name: Accessibility boundary
checklist.description: Keeps VoiceOver, Switch Control, and accessibility-specific focus out of scope except as a handoff to an accessibility skill.
